resources.string: Your session has been timed out.
Something went wrong please try again
Context is invalid
Device architecture not supported
Enable Biometric Access
Please Authenticate
BiometricAuthenticationHelp
BiometricAuthenticationFailed
BiometricAuthenticationError
BiometricAuthenticationSuccess
BiometricAuthenticationCancelled
BiometricAuthenticationNotAvailable
BiometricAuthenticationNotSupported
BiometricAuthenticationInternalError
BiometricAuthenticationPermissionNotGranted
Biometric Dialog title cannot be null
Biometric Dialog subtitle cannot be null
Biometric Dialog description cannot be null
Biometric Dialog negative button text cannot be null
Enable authentication
Authentication Successful.
Set Pattern
Provide Pattern
Provide Current Pattern
Set New Pattern
Confirm Pattern
Confirm Pattern
PatternAuthenticationFailed
PatternAuthenticationSuccess
PatternAuthenticationCancelled
DNA_LDA_USER_NAME
DNA_LDA_DESCRIPTION
Cancel
LDA_ENABLE_MSG
LDA_VERIFY_MSG
Please verify your identity
\n
LDA_STEPUP_NOTF_MSG
Enable authentication for __USER_ID__
Provide authentication for __USER_ID__
Provide authentication for __USER_ID__
Enable Pin/Pattern/Password/Biometric
Provide Pin/Pattern/Password/Biometric
Provide Pin/Pattern/Password/Biometric
Enable Biometric
Provide Biometric
Provide Biometric
Attempts left
SdkVersionNotSupported
Biometric
Face recognition
Fingerprint/Face recognition/Pattern
Local device
pattern
Success
SDK not initialized. Initialize the SDK for further activities.
Internal error occurred. Please try again.
Invalid SDK version.
Invalid arguments provided.
Your session has expired.
Invalid callbacks provided.
Invalid core data found during resume. Re-initialize the application.
An error occurred while initializing SDK. If the issue persists, kindly contact admin.
An internal error occurred while saving the core state during the pause runtime. Please try again.
An internal error occurred while initiating the core during the resume runtime. Please try again.
An internal error occurred while terminating the core.
The application ran out of memory. Please try again.
Invalid core context. Re-initialize the application.
SDK is already initialized.
CORE_ERR_ARCHITECTURE_NOT_SUPPORTED
Invalid device context provide, Please try again by re-launching the application.
SDK cannot be instantiated. Internal Error occurred while the security notification activity. Please contact admin.
Conflicting internal arguments provided to SDK. Please contact admin.
SDK initialization is already in progress, kindly wait till the process completes and try initializing again if a failure occurs
Failed to connect to the server via a proxy. Kindly check your network settings.
Invalid server Host/IP.
Invalid server port.
Invalid connection settings.
Failed to connect to a server. Kindly check your internet connection.
Domain name resolution failed. Kindly contact admin if the issue persists.
No network connection detected. Please check to make sure you are connected to a network to continue.
Timeout occurred while attempting connection. The server may be too busy to accept new connections.
Internal network error occurred.
Unable to connect to the server. The connection attempt timed out, Please check your network settings and try again if the issue persists kindly contact admin.
DNS request timed-out. Please check your network settings and try again.
The server failed to respond within the specified time. Please try again. If the issue persists, kindly contact admin.
Failed to connect to server - server actively refused the connection. Please try again. If the issue persists, kindly contact admin.
The connection to the server was broken or was forcibly closed by the remote host, Please try again, if the issue persists kindly contact admin.
The service you are trying to access is not valid or not configured. Kindly contact admin for further details.
Internal server error occurred. Please try again. If the issue persists, kindly contact admin.
Access token generation facility is not available at the moment, Please try again. If the issue persists, kindly contact admin.
Invalid response was received from the server, Please try again. If the issue persists, kindly contact admin.
Error occurred while processing the request, Please try again after some time. If the issue persists kindly contact admin.
Failed to parse HTTP requests. Please try again.
Failed to parse HTTP response. Please try again.
Invalid cipher specs. Please try again.
Failed to open rest HTTP service. Please try again.
Invalid rest HTTP API request URL. Please retry with valid HTTP details.
Failed to deserialize JSON
Invalid challenge JSON received
Unable to process your request, malformed request received. Please try again, if the issue persists kindly contact admin
Unable to process your request, provided HTTP method not supported. Please try again, if the issue persists kindly contact admin
Unable to process your request, unsupported HTTP protocol. Please try again, if the issue persists kindly contact admin
RDNA_ERR_FAILED_TO_GET_STREAM_PRIVACYSCOPE
RDNA_ERR_FAILED_TO_GET_STREAM_TYPE
RDNA_ERR_FAILED_TO_WRITE_INTO_STREAM
RDNA_ERR_FAILED_TO_END_STREAM
RDNA_ERR_FAILED_TO_DESTROY_STREAM
Error occurred while creating privacy stream. Please try again. If the issue persists, kindly contact admin.
Error occurred while initializing the security certificates provided. Kindly contact admin if the issue persists.
Internal error occurred. There seems to be an issue with the security certificates provided.
An error occurred while securing your connection. Kindly correct your system date and time and try again. If the issue persists, kindly contact admin.
Failed to get cipher salt. Please try again.
Failed to get cipher specs. Please try again.
Failed to get Agent ID. Kindly reinitialize the application and try again.
Failed to get session ID. Kindly reinitialize the application and try again.
Failed to get device ID. Please try again.
An error occurred while using data at rest API while encrypting data. Please try again. If the issue persists, kindly contact admin.
An error occurred while using data at rest API while decrypting data. Please try again. If the issue persists, kindly contact admin.
An error occurred while using data at rest API while encrypting HTTP request. Please try again. If the issue persists, kindly contact admin.
An error occurred while using data at rest API while decrypting HTTP response. Please try again. If the issue persists, kindly contact admin.
Invalid user state in secure storage. Please try again.
Invalid proxy credentials provided. Please provide valid credentials and try again.
Invalid input length specified for decryption, Please try again with a valid value. If the issue persists, kindly contact admin.
Invalid input provided for decryption, Please try again with valid input. If the issue persists, kindly contact admin.
Invalid input provided for encryption, Please try again with valid input. If the issue persists, kindly contact admin.
Invalid input length specified for encryption, Please try again with a valid value. If the issue persists, kindly contact admin.
Invalid user ID provided. Please retry with a valid user ID.
User saved state corrupted or was cleared from this device. Please re-activate yourself on this device. If the issue persists, kindly contact admin.
Invalid credential provided. Please try again.
Failed to recover Login-ID, invalid E-Mail ID provided. Please try again with a valid E-MAIL ID. If the issue persists, kindly contact admin.
Invalid Login ID provided
Invalid agent REL-ID was found in the connection profile. Kindly contact admin for further details.
Failed to get service details. Kindly contact admin.
Failed to start service. Please try again. If the issue persists, kindly contact admin.
Failed to stop service. Please try again. If the issue persists, kindly contact admin.
An unsupported user REL-ID found. Kindly contact admin for further details.
Failed to parse device details.
Invalid or empty service name provided, Please retry with the valid service name.
Invalid device details provided for updation, Please retry with valid details.
This device has been blocked by admin.
Session can\'t be created as the user is already logged in from another device.
Unable to activate the device - Device limit exceeded. Kindly contact admin.
Login-id and username cannot be the same. Kindly enter a new login-id.
The server encountered an internal error while adding specified LOGIN-ID, Please try again, if the issue persists kindly contact admin.
You have insufficient privileges to perform this task, please try again with another user, if the issue persists kindly contact admin.
An internal error occurred while performing a challenge request response. Please try again. If the issue persists, kindly contact admin.
An internal error occurred while performing an update credentials request. Please try again. If the issue persists, kindly contact admin.
An internal error occurred while fetching application configuration from the server. Please try again.
Failed to get all configured updated challenges. Please try again.
An error occurred while resetting the challenges. Please try again.
Failed to fetch post login challenges. Please try again.
Invalid challenge configuration received. Please try again. if the issue persists, kindly contact admin.
Invalid challenge response submitted, Please try again. If the issue persists, kindly contact admin.
Invalid use case specified for post-login authentication, Please try again. If the issue persists, kindly contact admin.
Invalid challenge authentication sequence. Kindly re-initialize the application and try again.
Invalid authentication details received. Kindly try again.
Unable to proceed with user authentication. Invalid user auth configuration on the server. Please contact admin.
Unable to reset user authentication sequence, inconsistent SDK state. Kindly re-launch and initialize the application. If the issue persists, kindly contact admin.
Unable to perform the update operation, No credentials to update.
Un-supported challenge/s configured on the server, Please re-launch the application and try again. If the issue persists, kindly contact admin.
Invalid API executed against the internal state, Please try again. If the issue persists, kindly contact admin.
Unable to proceed with user activation, Activation choice currently not supported, Please try again with a different activation choice.
Operation cannot be completed, invalid user authentication sequence state. Please try again. If the issue persists, kindly contact admin.
Update operation cannot be completed as, the credential you are trying to update is not supported for updation. Retry again with other supported credentials.
Unable to activate user, invalid or no supported authentication mechanism registered. Please try again. If the issue persists, kindly contact admin.
Unable complete user activation. Failed to generate and save user data
Users biometric authentication failed. Cannot activate the user. Please try again. If the issue persists try to activate using other activation options if available or kindly contact admin.
Invalid challenge received as part of initial challenge, Kindly try again by re-launching the application. If the issue persists, kindly contact admin.
LOGIN ID already exists. Please try again with a different LOGIN ID.
An error occurred while adding LOGIN ID. Please try again. If the issue persists, kindly contact admin.
Password policy validation failed, invalid policy configuration, Please try again. If the issue persists, kindly contact admin.
Provided password does not satisfy the password policy set.
You have exceeded the limit to set login id. Please contact admin.
Credential update failed, Entered current credentials do not match login credentials, you will be logged off kindly retry after logging in.
Attempts exhausted while enabling additional authentications. For security reasons you will be logged out of the application.
The requested authentication mechanism is already in the desired state, nothing to update.
Authentication mechanism is currently not supported. Please try again with a different mechanism. If the issue persists, kindly contact admin.
Unable to proceed with the request, failed to start the authorization process. kindly re-login and try again. If the issue persists, kindly contact admin.
Unable to proceed with the requested authentication mechanism. Please try again with a different mechanism. If the issue persists, kindly contact admin.
Current and new password should be different
Current and new patterns should be different
Unable to process your request, the attempts limit has not been properly configured. If the issue persists kindly contact admin.
Request failed. The additional authentication is already in progress please wait for it to complete and try again. If the issue persists kindly contact admin.
Request failed. Specified additional authentication is not supported, Please try again, if the issue persists kindly contact admin.

A change in device authentication settings have been detected, unable to proceed with your request at the moment, Kindly re-enable authentication settings from the menu and try again. If the issue persists, kindly contact admin.
The chosen verification option is not supported, please try again with a valid verification method
The selected authentication method is not supported at this time. Please choose a different method. If the issue persists, contact your administrator for assistance.
An error occurred while logging off the user. Please try again.
Failed to perform forgot password. Please try again.
Failed to get registered user device details. Please try again.
Failed to update user device details. Please try again.
Failure occurred when signing notification. Please try again.
User session is invalid. Failed to fetch notification history.
An error occurred while fetching notification history. Please try again or Kindly contact admin if the issue persists.
Invalid tunnel configurations received. Please try again. if the issue persists, kindly contact admin.
Internal error occurred while serializing data, Please try again. If the issue persists, kindly contact admin.
Invalid notification history payload received, Please try again. If the issue persists, kindly contact admin.
Your session has been terminated - User REL-ID not found. Kindly contact admin.
You need to login into the application to use this feature.
Operation you wish to perform cannot be completed due to an internal error, kindly re-login and try again. If the issue persists, kindly contact admin.
Unable to perform operation due to incomplete data, Please try again. If the issue persists, kindly contact admin.
Your session is terminated - User or Device state is invalid. Kindly contact admin.
You are not logged in. Kindly login with a valid username and credentials and try again. If the issue persists, kindly contact admin.
You have been logged out due to security reasons.Kindly login to activate your device.
Failed to get the notification for the user. Please try again.
Failed to update user\'s action performed on a notification. Please try again.
Failed to update notification, __FINGERPRINT__ authentication cancelled by user
Failed to update notification, __FINGERPRINT__ authentication cancelled by the system
Failed to update notification, __FINGERPRINT__ authentication operation was cancelled because the API is locked out due to too many attempts. Try again after some time.
Failed to update notification, __FACERECOGNITION__ authentication cancelled by user
Failed to update notification, __FACERECOGNITION__ authentication cancelled by the system
Failed to update notification, __FACERECOGNITION__ authentication operation was cancelled because the API is locked out due to too many attempts. Try again after some time.
Failed to update notification, Pattern authentication cancelled by user
Failed to update notification, authentication failure
Failed to update notification, configured authentication is not supported, Please try again, if the issue persists kindly contact admin.
Failed to update notification, the required additional authentication is already in progress please wait for it to complete and try again. If the issue persists kindly contact admin.
Unable to process your request, maximum attempts for additional authentication exhausted, Please try again, if the issue persists kindly contact admin.
__FINGERPRINT__ authentication cancelled by user
__FINGERPRINT__ authentication cancelled by the system
__FINGERPRINT__ authentication operation was cancelled because the API is locked out due to too many attempts. Try again after some time.
__FACERECOGNITION__ authentication cancelled by user
__FACERECOGNITION__ authentication cancelled by the system
__FACERECOGNITION__ authentication operation was cancelled because the API is locked out due to too many attempts. Try again after some time.
Pattern authentication cancelled by user
Kindly enable/register __FINGERPRINT__ authentication from device settings and retry again.
Kindly enable/register __FACERECOGNITION__ authentication from device settings and retry again.
Pattern authentication not supported. Please try again. If the issues persist, kindly contact admin.
You need to enable __FINGERPRINT__/__FACERECOGNITION__ authentication from the device settings and authorize yourself to respond to a notification.
An attempt to activate local device authentication (__LDA__) was skipped or failed. You can activate this from settings at a later point in time.
We have sensed a change in the existing __FINGERPRINT__/__FACERECOGNITION__ authentication settings which can access your phone. As a security measure, you will be asked to re-activate your device.
Your session has been terminated - __FINGERPRINT__/__FACERECOGNITION__ authentication which is used to access your phone has been modified.
Request failed. Unable to verify user identity, __FINGERPRINT__ authentication cancelled by user
Request failed. Unable to verify user identity, __FINGERPRINT__ authentication cancelled by the system
Request failed. Unable to verify user identity, __FINGERPRINT__ authentication operation was cancelled because the API is locked out due to too many attempts. Try again after some time.
Request failed. Unable to verify user identity, __FACERECOGNITION__ authentication cancelled by user
Request failed. Unable to verify user identity, __FACERECOGNITION__ authentication cancelled by the system
Request failed. Unable to verify user identity, __FACERECOGNITION__ authentication operation was cancelled because the API is locked out due to too many attempts. Try again after some time.
Request failed. Unable to verify user identity, Pattern authentication cancelled by user
Request failed. User authentication failure
Request failed. Unable to verify user identity. You need to enable __FINGERPRINT__/__FACERECOGNITION__ authentication from the device settings and authorize yourself to proceed.
__FINGERPRINT__/__FACERECOGNITION__ authentication cancelled by application, Please try again, if the issue persists kindly contact admin.
Unable to process __FINGERPRINT__/__FACERECOGNITION__ authentication due to invalid context, Please try again, if the issue persists kindly contact admin.
__FINGERPRINT__/__FACERECOGNITION__ authentication attempt with an apple watch was unsuccessful as the system could not locate a nearby paired apple watch running

Unable to process __FINGERPRINT__/__FACERECOGNITION__ authentication as displaying the required authentication user interface is forbidden. Please try again. If the issue persists kindly contact admin.
Internal error occurred while performing __FINGERPRINT__/__FACERECOGNITION__ authentication.
Request failed. No fallback option is available for __FINGERPRINT__/__FACERECOGNITION__ authentication, Please try again. If the issue persists kindly contact admin.
Passcode isn\'t set on the device, Kindly set a valid passcode from system settings and try again, if the issue persists kindly contact admin.
__FINGERPRINT__/__FACERECOGNITION__ authentication not supported.
__FINGERPRINT__/__FACERECOGNITION__ authentication was unsuccessful as the necessary authentication settings were not enabled in the device settings.
You have declined permission to use __FINGERPRINT__/__FACERECOGNITION__ authentication.
You need to enable atleast one __FINGERPRINT__/__FACERECOGNITION__ authentication from the device settings and try again.
Please provide your password to proceed as we have found that no __FINGERPRINT__/__FACERECOGNITION__ authentication settings are enabled on the device.
Palm Vein identification not supported or not available at this time, please try again. If the issue persists, kindly contact admin.
Invalid TOTP context object received. Kindly re-initialize the application and try again.
Invalid TOTP configuration received from the server. Kindly log in again to enable TOTP. If the issue persists, contact admin.
User successfully registered for TOTP.
Authentication cancelled by User while generating TOTP.
User is not registered for TOTP. Kindly log in to enable TOTP.
Request received to generate TOTP for a user other than the LOGGED-IN user.
TOTP will be generated only if the user is either OFFLINE or successfully LOGGED-IN.
An error occurred in TOTP flows. Kindly try again. If the issue persists, contact admin.
User authentication attempts for TOTP exhausted. TOTP generation is blocked for the user. Please login into the application to re-register for TOTP.
An error occurred while registering the user for TOTP. Kindly validate your system date and time and try again. If the issue persists, contact admin.
TOTP feature is not supported or enabled for your application. Kindly contact admin
TOTP registration is in progress. Please wait and try after a while.

An error occurred while registering for TOTP, possibly due to a time mismatch between your device and the server. Kindly correct your system date and time to use automatic settings and try to log in again. If the issue persists, kindly contact admin.
Application integrity is compromised. Kindly re-install the application. If the issue persists, kindly contact admin.
Your device is not secure. Kindly resolve the reported threats and try again. If the issue persists, kindly contact admin.
The feature or operation that you are trying to access is not supported in the current configuration. Please try again. If the issue persists, kindly contact admin.
The application you are using is a debug build. Kindly install the application from a trusted app store and try again.
The application is running on an emulator. Kindly run the application on a physical android device and try again.
The application is not installed from a trusted source. Kindly install the application from a trusted app store and try again.
Package information of this application is invalid. Kindly contact admin for more details.
The application is repackaged and is not safe to use. Kindly install the application from a trusted app store and try again.
Your device may be insecure, threat scan was not successful, missing app insight key in MTD configuration, kindly contact admin.
Your device is not secure. Kindly resolve the reported threats and try again. If the issue persists, kindly contact admin.
The operation performed is invalid, only Mobile Threat Detection features are enabled

We\'re sorry, but your device lacks the necessary built-in security features required to protect your account. For your safety, access is not permitted on this device. Please try using a different device with enhanced security capabilities.
The version of the app you\'re using is no longer supported. Please update to the latest version to continue using all features and ensure security.
Your identity verification process failed.
Failed to perform KYC operation, user ID provided should be different than logged-in user ID
IDV core library not found.
IDV document scan library not found.
IDV selfie capture library not found.
Null or invalid context received for IDV core.
Null or invalid context received for IDV selfie capture.
Null or invalid context received for IDV document capture.
Internal error occurred during IDV workflow.
Invalid challenge received during IDV workflow.
Invalid challenge operation mode received for IDV workflow.
Invalid IDV workflow.
Invalid usecase name received for IDV workflow.
Invalid transaction ID received for IDV workflow.
Invalid User ID received for IDV workflow.
KYC process failed due to invalid user ID.
IDV activation was canceled by the user.
IDV activation with template canceled by the user.
IDV additional device activation was canceled by the user.
IDV additional device activation without template canceled by the user.
IDV account recovery with template canceled by the user.
IDV account recovery without template canceled by the user.
IDV post login KYC canceled by the user
IDV additional document scan canceled by the user
IDV selfie biometric was canceled by the user
IDV step - up authentication was canceled by the user
IDV opt - in was canceled by the user.
IDV opt - out was canceled by the user.
IDV KYC for user canceled by the agent.
IDV onboarding was canceled by the user.
IDV login flow was canceled by the user.
IDV setup authentication and sign data flow were canceled by the user.
Invalid app configuration provided for IDV.
Invalid document scan configuration provided.
Invalid selfie capture configuration provided.
Camera permission is not provided by the user.
File read - write permission is not provided by the user.
Invalid PKD certificate URL provided.
PKD certificate not found.
Failed to download the PKD certificate.
Invalid database url provided.
Document scan database not found.
Failed to download the database.
Document scan license not found.
Invalid arguments provided.
Internal error occurred during KYC flow.
The selfie capture flow was canceled by the user.
Insufficient storage.
Invalid audit info provided.
Failed to record the transaction details for IDV.
Null or invalid callback object received for IDV core.
Null or invalid callback object received for IDV selfie capture.
Null or invalid callback object received for IDV document capture.
IDV asset loading error occurred during Selfie capture initialization.
IDV Selfie capture license expired.
IDV profile could not be loaded during Selfie capture initialization.
IDV internal init error occurred during Selfie capture initialization.
IDV model initialization error occurred during selfie capture init.
IDV Selfie capture canceled by selfie SDK.
IDV SDK failed to create a window.
IDV SDK failed to create a root view controller.
IDV Document scan license data is nil or invalid.
IDV Document scan callback registration failed.
Unknown exception occurred at the document scan layer.
Unknown exception occurred at the document reader state.
Wrong input was provided for IDV document capture.
IDV document scanner initialization failed.
The wrong input was provided for IDV online processing.
IDV license file is absent or corrupted.
The IDV license may be expired, or the date and time set on the device don\'t correspond to reality.
IDV invalid license version.
IDV invalid device ID for the license.
An invalid app package name is detected for IDV.
There are no capabilities for this functionality in your IDV license.
There are no authenticity capabilities in your IDV license.
Incorrect or corrupted database file for IDV.
IDV Bluetooth LE error.
The application was in the background during the document scan.
IDV SDK database error during download or is corrupted.
Failed to set TCC parameters for IDV.
IDV failed during the online processing.
Bluetooth LE feature is not supported on your device during IDV operation.
IDV Document scan canceled by the user.
IDV Document scan error occurred during the completion handling.
IDV Document scan error occurred during result parsing.
The scanned document type is invalid.
Failed to extract the document detail, Field Types are empty.
The scanned document is not supported.
Failed to initialize the RFID scan session.
IDV error occurred during the RFID scan completion.
Document Reader Core framework is absent.
This scenario is not supported based on your license and Core framework capabilities.
There are no results after the recognition of camera frames.
An error is encountered during database removal.
An error is encountered to fetch the database.
IDV error incorrect database ID.
IDV error Database description not found.
IDV error is encountered to save the database on your device.
IDV database is corrupted or checksum is incorrect.
IDV eror failed to create database.
IDV RFID Internal error occurred.
IDV Incorrect Database ID provided.
IDV Invalid database config received.
IDV database download is in progress.
IDV document scan database is not selected.
IDV internal client error.
IDV internal document scan SDK error.
IDV selfie capture failed.
IDV document scan license online error.
IDV error no database available.
IDV error incorrect database provided.
IDV error occurred during the RFID scan inprogress.
IDV passive authentication certificate not found.
IDV error response json conversion failed
IDV palm verification canceled by user.
IDV customer detail saved successfully.
Person onboarding canceled by agent
IDV palm Enrollment canceled by user.
IDV PALM capture library not found.
IDV error failed to log event
Your identity verification process failed Err - 338.
Your identity verification process failed Err - 339.
Your identity verification process failed Err - 340.
Your identity verification process failed Err - 341.
Your identity verification process failed Err - 342.
Your identity verification process failed Err - 343.
Your identity verification process failed Err - 344.
Your identity verification process failed Err - 345.
Your identity verification process failed Err - 346.
Your identity verification process failed Err - 347.
Your identity verification process failed Err - 348.
Your identity verification process failed Err - 349.
Your identity verification process failed Err - 350.
Your identity verification process failed Err - 351.
Your identity verification process failed Err - 352.
Your identity verification process failed Err - 353.
Your identity verification process failed Err - 354.
Your identity verification process failed Err - 355.
Your identity verification process failed Err - 356.
Your identity verification process failed Err - 357.
Your identity verification process failed Err - 358.
Your identity verification process failed Err - 359.
Your identity verification process failed Err - 360.
Your identity verification process failed Err - 361.
Your identity verification process failed Err - 362.
Your identity verification process failed Err - 363.
Your identity verification process failed Err - 364.
Your identity verification process failed Err - 365.
Your identity verification process failed Err - 366.
Your identity verification process failed Err - 367.
Your identity verification process failed Err - 368.
Your identity verification process failed Err - 369.
Your identity verification process failed Err - 370.
Your identity verification process failed Err - 371.
Your identity verification process failed Err - 372.
Your identity verification process failed Err - 373.
Your identity verification process failed Err - 374.
Your identity verification process failed Err - 375.
Your identity verification process failed Err - 376.
Your identity verification process failed Err - 377.
Your identity verification process failed Err - 378.
Your identity verification process failed Err - 379.
Your identity verification process failed Err - 380.
Your identity verification process failed Err - 381.
Your identity verification process failed Err - 382.
Your identity verification process failed Err - 383.
Your identity verification process failed Err - 384.
Your identity verification process failed Err - 385.
Your identity verification process failed Err - 386.
Your identity verification process failed Err - 387.
Your identity verification process failed Err - 388.
Your identity verification process failed Err - 389.
Your identity verification process failed Err - 390.
Your identity verification process failed Err - 391.
Your identity verification process failed Err - 392.
Your identity verification process failed Err - 393.
Your identity verification process failed Err - 394.
Your identity verification process failed Err - 395.
Your identity verification process failed Err - 396.
Your identity verification process failed Err - 397.
Your identity verification process failed Err - 398.
Your identity verification process failed Err - 399.
Your identity verification process failed Err - 400.
Digital identity workflow aborted successfully.
Currently there is no worklfow in progress, kindly initiate a worklfow to proceed with the operation
Your account recovery was successful! For your security, please log in again to continue.
Your credential has been successfully updated! For your security, please log in again.
SIM Binding failed due to an invalid server configuration. Please re-launch and initialize the application. If the issue continues, contact support.
SIM Binding request failed: OTP validation attempts exhausted. Please re-initiate the process. If the issue persists, contact support.
An internal error occurred while generating the OTP. Please re-initiate the process. If the issue persists, contact support.
An internal error occurred during OTP validation. Please re-initiate the process. If the issue persists, contact support.
SIM Binding request failed due to an internal error. Please try again. If the issue persists, contact support.
SIM Binding process was cancelled by the user.
SIM Binding failed: SMS operation timed out.
SIM Binding request failed: Required permissions were not granted. Please enable permissions and try again. If the issue persists, contact support.
SIM Binding request failed: No network detected. Please ensure your phone has an active network connection and Airplane mode is turned off. Then try again. If the issue persists, contact support.
SIM Binding request failed: This device does not support cellular connectivity. Please use a device with an active SIM and mobile network support.

SIM Binding failed: This device lacks the required built-in security features needed to securely bind your SIM. For your protection, this operation is not permitted on this device. Please try again using a device with hardware-backed security.
Your account recovery was successful. To ensure your security, SIM binding must be re-verified on this device. Please proceed with SIM binding and log in again to continue.
SIM binding request failed. Please check that your SIM is properly inserted or that your eSIM profile is correctly set up. Try again, and if the issue persists, contact support.
Your session has expired as SIM binding registration was detected from another device. Kindly re-register SIM binding to continue using the app.
Request failed. Unable to verify user identity. Please try again. If the issue persists kindly contact admin
Failed to perform operation, invalid input provided, please try again. If the issue persists, kindly contact admin.
